stage1_premium_existence.construct: per_contract_atm_iv (tenor-matched, moneyness <= 3%) minus forward close-to-close RV
stage1_premium_existence.mechanism: term structure INVERTED in 2022 bear (45d 1.7 pts below 30d); sign flip structural
stage1_premium_existence.left_tail: p01 -19 to -33 vol pts; worst obs -54; insurance-shaped

conclusion: The premium exists (Stage 1) and retail multi-leg execution cost consumes it (Stage 2): ~$13.6/trade round-trip cost vs ~$11/trade mid-priced edge on the canonical structure, with the 2022 bear uncompensated. Revisit only by attacking execution cost (wider structures, fewer legs, more liquid underlyings, better fills) — not entry signals.
prior_evidence_confirmed: forward-ledger miniature Stage 2 (10-0 at mid -> 0-10 at k=1.0), replicated at n=129
do_not: read as validating the 0DTE/1-5DTE product (wrong horizon)
re-run with fresh thresholds absent a pre-registered execution-cost change
